name: primitive_string_number_noninteger_stays_fallback
description: Mcoerce-d PR 1 FALLBACK (number-display parity): string target, JSON 5e0. BAML's jsonish::Value::Number stores serde_json f64 and Display CANONICALIZES the spelling (5e0 -> "5.0"), which native's raw-token render cannot prove byte-identical, so native marks the display UNCERTAIN and DECLINES (over-claim guard; native leg skipped in the differential). want is BAML's canonical serde f64 Display.
